title: 信息图可视化设计
description:
案例「type」属于信息图/结构图。这是一张信息图/结构图类案例，重点不是单一画面主体，而是把主题内容拆成清晰模块，用标题、图标、箭头、分区、编号、标签和说明文字组织信息。适合改成知识科普、人物关系、流程图、城市地图、产品说明、攻略指南等高信息密度视觉。

原始提示词要点：这是一条结构化提示词，原文使用 JSON/参数协议描述画面。案例类型为“scientific optical setup diagram”，核心由 type, main_setup, inset_diagram, bottom_caption 等部分组成。展示层建议不要直接暴露原始 JSON，而应转译为中文说明与可填空模板，方便用户理解画面结构、替换主题、复用版式。
prompt_raw:
{
  "type": "scientific optical setup diagram",
  "main_setup": {
    "base": "optical breadboard table with grid of mounting holes",
    "beam": "red laser beam passing horizontally through all components",
    "top_grouping_brackets": [
      "Dual Modulation",
      "4f Relay Optics",
      "Imaging Optics",
      "Detection"
    ],
    "components_left_to_right": [
      { "name": "Laser", "label": "λ = 632.8 nm", "appearance": "black rectangular box" },
      { "name": "SLM1", "label": "(Phase / Pol. Mod.)", "appearance": "black square device on post" },
      { "name": "Lens L1", "label": "(f1)", "appearance": "lens in black ring mount" },
      { "name": "Iris", "label": "Fourier Plane (Pupil Plane) / (Higher Orders Filtered)", "appearance": "black ring mount with dashed line above" },
      { "name": "HWP", "label": "(λ/2)", "appearance": "purple-tinted optic in black ring mount" },
      { "name": "Lens L2", "label": "(f1)", "appearance": "lens in black ring mount" },
      { "name": "SLM2", "label": "(Phase / Pol. Mod.)", "appearance": "black square device on post" },
      { "name": "Lens L3", "label": "(f2)", "appearance": "lens in black ring mount" },
      { "name": "Lens L4", "label": "(f2)", "appearance": "lens in black ring mount" },
      { "name": "Linear Polarizer", "label": "(Global Analyzer)", "appearance": "lens in black ring mount" },
      { "name": "Polarization Camera", "label": "POLARIZATION CAMERA", "appearance": "blue and black box camera" }
    ]
  },
  "inset_diagram": {
    "position": "bottom right, dashed border",
    "title": "Polarization Camera Micro-Polarizer Array (Per-Pixel Analyzer)",
    "visuals": "4x4 grid of colored squares with white directional arrows",
    "legend_count": 4,
    "legend_labels": [
      "red right-arrow 0° (H)",
      "green up-arrow 90° (V)",
      "blue diagonal-arrow 45° (D)",
      "yellow diagonal-arrow 135° (A)"
    ]
  },
  "bottom_caption": {
    "figure_number": "Fig. 5.",
    "title": "Ellipsography Hardware Setup.",
    "description": "Our prototype display system employs a dual-modulation configuration to achieve simultaneous control of phase and polarization. A 4f relay optics setup transfers the modulated wavefront..."
  }
}
prompt_display_cn:
案例「type」属于信息图/结构图。这是一张信息图/结构图类案例，重点不是单一画面主体，而是把主题内容拆成清晰模块，用标题、图标、箭头、分区、编号、标签和说明文字组织信息。适合改成知识科普、人物关系、流程图、城市地图、产品说明、攻略指南等高信息密度视觉。

原始提示词要点：这是一条结构化提示词，原文使用 JSON/参数协议描述画面。案例类型为“scientific optical setup diagram”，核心由 type, main_setup, inset_diagram, bottom_caption 等部分组成。展示层建议不要直接暴露原始 JSON，而应转译为中文说明与可填空模板，方便用户理解画面结构、替换主题、复用版式。
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的信息图/结构图。

画面定位：
面向【目标读者】，用于【使用场景】，整体要求信息清楚、层级明确、视觉有吸引力。

主体内容：
以【核心对象/中心主题】为视觉中心，周围分成【模块数量】个信息模块，分别展示【模块1】、【模块2】、【模块3】、【模块4】等内容。

版式结构：
采用【版式结构】，使用清晰的标题区、分区框、箭头连线、编号标签、图标和简短说明文字组织信息。重要内容要突出，次要内容保持整齐。

视觉风格：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，背景为【背景样式】，配色使用【主色调】，图形元素保持统一。

文字要求：
所有需要显示的文字使用【文字语言】，标题和标签清晰可读，避免乱码、错字和过度拥挤。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布渠道/用途】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"目标读者","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入目标读者","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"使用场景","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入使用场景","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"核心对象/中心主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入核心对象/中心主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"模块数量","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块数量","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"1","label":"模块1","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块1","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"2","label":"模块2","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块2","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"3","label":"模块3","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块3","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"4","label":"模块4","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块4","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"版式结构","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入版式结构","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"视觉风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入视觉风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"背景样式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入背景样式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_13","label":"主色调","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主色调","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_14","label":"文字语言","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入文字语言","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_15","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_16","label":"发布渠道/用途","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入发布渠道/用途","required":true,"type":"text"}]
